div.p: On November 6 Ambassador Bruce and Alexandre Parodi, Secretary-General of the French Ministry of Foreign Affairs, signed for their respective Governments an agreement regarding the establishment and operation of a line of communication across France, including annexes on the juridical status of U.S. Armed Forces personnel stationed in France and in French North Africa, financing of the Line of Communication, and radio facilities. There were also an exchange of letters with regard to displaced persons of Polish origin to be employed by United States Forces on the territory of Metropolitan France and a letter signed by Ambassador Bruce with regard to the status of U.S. military personnel in French North Africa. Documentation on these subjects is in Department of State file No. 711.56351.
